chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6009 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition 27.01.2025 Mr. Anas Habib, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Javed Aii Sangi, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Kailash A. Vaswani, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Perusal of prayer clause demonstrates that Order-in-Original rendered by the Sindh Revenue Board has been assailed in writ jurisdiction of this court. Prima facie, this petition is not maintainable as while the petitioner had right to assail any order in the statutory hierarchy. No case is made out to assail the said order directly in writ jurisdiction. In view hereof, petition being misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
